title: Testing
excerpt: description: Compare testing options for Cloudflare Workers, including Vitest integration, Miniflare, and unstable_startWorker. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The Workers platform has a variety of ways to test your applications, depending on your requirements. We recommend using the [Vitest integration](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/testing/vitest-integration), which allows you to run tests _inside_ the Workers runtime, and unit test individual functions within your Worker.…
